recipe.title: TikTok Wrap Hack — Crunchwrap Supreme Edition

ingredients.name: large flour tortillas
ingredients.note: ~10 inch; source prefers flour over corn for fold integrity

ingredients.name: tortilla chips
ingredients.note: or as desired for crunch layer

steps.text: Brown ground beef over medium-high heat until cooked through; drain excess fat if needed.
steps.textureCue: sizzling fat sheen and breaking crumb edges
steps.runwayRisk: grease splatter; keep macro tight on pan center

steps.text: Stir in chili powder, cumin, onion powder, garlic powder, smoked paprika, and cayenne; season with salt and pepper.
steps.visualCue: rust-red spice dust blooming into beef
steps.textureCue: dry spice puff then glossy coat
steps.runwayRisk: spice color can read as burnt; lock warm red-brown

steps.text: Lay tortilla flat; cut from center to one edge to create a radial slit opening four quadrants.
steps.visualCue: knife tip at center, clean radial slit on pale tortilla
steps.textureCue: soft flour flex at cut edge
steps.runwayRisk: cut must stay single radius to center, not full diameter

steps.text: Fill quadrants: bottom-left lettuce and tomato; top-left sour cream and tortilla chips; top-right cheese and beef; bottom-right extra cheese.
steps.textureCue: crisp chip edges vs creamy sour cream vs shredded cheese
steps.runwayRisk: chip count drift; lock 3-5 visible chips per quadrant

steps.text: Fold sequentially: bottom-left over top-left, then to top-right, then down to bottom-right into a compact triangle.
steps.visualCue: layer stack compressing into thick triangle
steps.textureCue: visible internal layers at fold seams
steps.runwayRisk: fold order confusion; use hard cuts between fold states

steps.text: Grill on induction skillet over medium heat until tortilla crisps and cheese melts, flipping once (~3-4 minutes per side).
steps.visualCue: golden lattice toast marks, cheese ooze at seam
steps.textureCue: crackle press and molten cheese pull
steps.runwayRisk: cloth-in-hand flip; use spatula turn only

steps.text: Rest triangle intact on island; serve hot.
steps.visualCue: intact golden triangle, steam wisps, no cut
steps.textureCue: crisp shell matte vs glossy cheese peek
steps.runwayRisk: model may add slice; lock intact geometry for outro handoff

assumptions: Large flour tortillas ~25 cm (10 in) diameter for scale locks across segments.
Single-serve hero wrap on Licorn island (not batch of six) for vertical video.
Induction skillet on @InductionWide instead of panini press (same crisp/cheese outcome).
Flour tortilla preferred per source for fold integrity.
criticalTransformations: Radial center-to-edge tortilla cut opening four quadrants
Sequential quarter-fold collapsing fillings into a thick triangle
Raw-soft tortilla to golden crisp grilled shell with melted cheese
Loose taco beef crumb to spice-coated glossy crumb
visualTextureOpportunities: Knife initiating radial slit through soft flour tortilla
Spice dust blooming on sizzling beef crumb
Sour cream spread vs crunchy tortilla chip stack contrast
Fold cascade revealing layered cross-section seams
Press-and-sizzle grill with cheese melt at triangle edge
Steam lift off golden grilled triangle shell
possibleHooks: Macro radial cut from tortilla center — instant geometry payoff in scene 2
Spice cloud hitting hot beef — color and ASMR sizzle
Four-quadrant color block before the fold
Satisfying sequential fold compressing into a thick triangle
Cheese pull and crisp shell crackle on the induction pan
